title: API quality-gate exemptions
description: Every Spectral rule waiver must be explicit, owned, justified, and time-boxed. Unbounded silent waivers are how a clean ruleset rots.

rule.description: Spectral rule id being waived, e.g. collection-get-has-pagination.

file.description: Path/glob of the spec the waiver applies to, e.g. api/openapi.yaml.

pointer.description: JSON Pointer to the operation/location, slashes encoded as ~1, e.g. /paths/~1applications/get.

justification.description: Why this is acceptable. One sentence of real reasoning, not 'TODO'.

owner.description: GitHub handle or team that owns the debt, e.g. @maduranga or @org/api-stewards.

expires.description: Hard expiry. After this date the build fails until the waiver is fixed or renewed.

issue.description: Tracking issue URL/ref for paying down the debt.
